sum: This mod adds a new cleric kit: the Priest of Mystra. He gains 1% magic resistance per level, has access to Spell Deflection from level 10 and Black Blade of Disaster from level 20.
no: This mod adds a new cleric kit: the Priest of Mystra. He gains 1% magic resistance per level, has access to Spell Deflection from level 10 and Black Blade of Disaster from level 20.
